scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm --filter @hono-ai/genui check && pnpm --filter @hono-ai/example-chat check
scripts.format: oxfmt package.json tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json examples/chat/package.json examples/chat/tsconfig.json packages/runtime/package.json packages/runtime/tsconfig.json packages/runtime/src
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json examples/chat/package.json examples/chat/tsconfig.json packages/runtime/package.json packages/runtime/tsconfig.json packages/runtime/src
